name: Larrain Vial Activos S.A. Administradora General - FI Larrain Vial Mexico Mezzanine
summary: Larrain Vial Activos S.A. Administradora General - FI Larrain Vial Mexico Mezzanine invests in mezzanine debt in Mexico. Larrain Vial Activos S.A. Administradora General manages the fund. The fund aims to provide investors with returns through investments in debt securities that rank between senior debt and equity in the capital structure of Mexican companies.
